steps.label: Choose source host
steps.description: Pick Forgejo, Gitea, GitHub, GitLab, or a custom Git host for this run.

steps.label: Choose sign-in method
steps.description: Prefer passkeys, with OIDC PKCE available for teams that already use an identity provider.

steps.label: Connect backend
steps.description: Enter a backend URL or select a local profile, then run health and greeting checks before saving.

steps.label: Choose privacy level
steps.description: Select Fast Secure, Secure Remote, ISP Destination Hidden, Relay Shield, or Local Sovereign.

steps.label: Choose resource profile
steps.description: Apply bounded CPU, memory, runtime, and concurrency limits before heavy work can start.

steps.label: Validate routes
steps.description: Check health, auth JSON, manifest, API, and chat routes for HTML fallback or challenge responses.

steps.label: Run AIBenchie gates
steps.description: Run the selected quality, privacy, security, resource, and release gates before publish.
